seo.title: Capability Lab About Override
seo.description: Host Capability Lab verifies host page override SEO and i18n metadata.

slots.homeBeforeTitle: Plugin slot before the home hero
slots.homeBeforeBody: A plugin can add host-governed content before the homepage hero without owning the page.
slots.homeAfterTitle: Plugin slot after the home hero
slots.homeAfterBody: The host keeps routing, layout, locale, navigation, and footer while the plugin contributes this block.
slots.pricingBeforeBody: This block is inserted before the pricing page body through hostPages.slots.
slots.pricingAfterBody: This block is inserted after the pricing cards without replacing the host page.

labPage.title: Real plugin capability probe
labPage.body: This page is rendered as a plugin route with the host site shell. The probe below writes, updates, queries, transacts, and deletes records through ctx.storage.

about.title: About page replaced by a plugin
about.body: This content is not a plugin-owned route. It is mounted into the host about page through hostPages.overrides, while the host shell keeps the site header, footer, language switcher, user menu, canonical metadata, and sitemap policy under host control.
about.seoI18nValue: Localized SEO metadata from the plugin contract

storage.title: ctx.storage live probe
storage.body: Verifies collection schema, database-filtered query operators, transaction, and soft delete in the real plugin runtime.
